PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robin Diamond appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

The Court stated that there was no problem with the Petition for Letters of Administration but that there was a problem with the Petition for Letters of Special Adminstration. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration , (subject to modification of the submitted order). The Petition for Letters of Special Adminstration was taken off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
